food.style_guide: Write like a food-loving friend recommending a deal. Use energy, excitement, and mouth-watering descriptions. Short sentences. Active voice. Create FOMO without being aggressive.
food.example_words: Hungry, Grab, Yummy, Sizzling, Delicious, Don't miss, Hot
food.avoid: formal language, corporate tone, passive voice, complex sentences

jewellery.style_guide: Write with elegance and prestige. Use occasion-based and aspirational language. For Indian context, reference festivals, auspicious occasions, gifts. Never feel cheap or discount-heavy.
jewellery.example_words: Exclusive, Precious, Timeless, Elegant, Coveted, Rare, Auspicious
jewellery.avoid: casual slang, food references, heavy discount language, aggressive urgency

fashion.style_guide: Write like a style-conscious friend sharing a hot tip. Use fashion vocabulary, trend references, season context and FOMO triggers. Reference current season.
fashion.example_words: Style, Trendy, Must-have, Chic, Look, Season, Fresh, New
fashion.avoid: outdated references, overly formal phrases, generic discount language

travel.style_guide: Paint vivid destination pictures. Use escape and adventure language. Reference weekends and getaways. Appeal to the travel-hungry urban Indian.
travel.example_words: Explore, Getaway, Adventure, Escape, Journey, Discover, Wander
travel.avoid: price-focused language, corporate travel phrases, office metaphors

electronics.style_guide: Speak to the smart buyer. Reference specs, savings, and smart decisions. Use upgrade language. Appeal to the tech-conscious Indian consumer who researches before buying.
electronics.example_words: Upgrade, Smart buy, Tech, Power, Performance, Save, Deal
electronics.avoid: vague descriptions, non-technical filler words, luxury language

grocery.style_guide: Write like a helpful neighbor sharing a good deal. Focus on savings, family needs, and weekly planning. Relatable and everyday language. No pretension.
grocery.example_words: Fresh, Save, Weekly, Family, Home, Essentials, Stock up
grocery.avoid: luxury language, complex vocabulary, aspirational language
